content: src/config/ must NOT import from src/codex/. The dependency direction is codex → config, never the reverse. Shared types that both layers need (e.g. severity enums) are duplicated at the config boundary rather than imported from codex/, specifically to prevent circular imports that bit the project during Phase 1A. When adding a new config field that references a codex concept, duplicate the enum/type at the config boundary and add a test that validates the two copies stay in sync.
context: Established during Phase 1A core types + config — 2026-02-18 handover. The severity enum in src/config/types.ts (BlockOnSeveritySchema) is a deliberate duplicate of the one in src/codex/types.ts. A future "just consolidate the enum" refactor would re-introduce the circular import this pattern was set up to avoid.
title: Config layer must not import from codex layer
